PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-24-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LYFT INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AS PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO DOCUMENTATION HAS BEEN RECEIVED TO DATE: HOWEVER, THE COURT CALLED THE PLAINTIFF AND HE CONFIRMED THAT THE DEFENDANT PAID THE AGREED UPON AMOUNT. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE: CASE SETTLED

REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 06/02/20. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "UNABLE TO FORWARD."
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-10-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO OCT-16-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. R. SAHATJIAN (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY HADDAD, MELAD AS TO DEFENDANT LYFT INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-03-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-16-2020 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-16-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MELAD HADDAD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LYFT, INC. REPRESENTED BY JEANNIE LIEU, PARALEGAL IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. PARTIES REACH A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT FOR THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $343.83 IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF IS TO PROVIDE WRITTEN NOTICE TO THE COURT ONCE THE AGREED TO AMOUNT HAS BEEN SATISFIED BY DEFENDANT LYFT, INC. AT WHICH TIME THIS MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JEANNIE LIU, PARALEGAL FILED BY DEFENDANT LYFT INC.
